raw_consumer_statement: After several weeks of disputing my claim from American Express travel, they approved my claim and denial was overturned however, in order for me to receive a check, I need to forfeit my travel credits from XXXX how ever American Express travel are unable and jet blue arent able to forfeit the credits so I can receive a check from the claims department I have to wait until XX/XX/XXXX to receive a refund I have the claim adjusters name who approved my claim. And number XXXX ( XXXX ) XXXX American missed informed me thats why my claim was approved and overturned in my favor My purchase date was XX/XX/XXXX total of {$1300.00}
